workflow.name: Keycloak HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Keycloak HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Keycloak inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/keycloak-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[keycloak]
10.31.111.11 role=identity name=keycloak-01
10.31.111.12 role=identity name=keycloak-02
10.31.111.13 role=identity name=keycloak-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Keycloak container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/keycloak-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: keycloak
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/keycloak-inventory.ini /tmp/keycloak-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Keycloak cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/keycloak-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: keycloak
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/keycloak
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/keycloak/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            keycloak:
              image: quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:25.0
              container_name: octastack-keycloak
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "start-dev"
              environment:
                KEYCLOAK_ADMIN: "admin"
                KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD: "change-me"
              ports:
                - "8080:8080"
              volumes:
                - data:/opt/keycloak/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Keycloak cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/keycloak-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/keycloak/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/keycloak/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/keycloak/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/keycloak-inventory.ini /tmp/keycloak-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Keycloak topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/keycloak-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Keycloak HA topology

Members:
- keycloak-01: 10.31.111.11 (identity)
- keycloak-02: 10.31.111.12 (identity)
- keycloak-03: 10.31.111.13 (identity)

This example deploys one Keycloak container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/keycloak-topology.md

data.label: Validate Keycloak cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/keycloak-inventory.ini keycloak -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
